description: The finance department needs to generate and send the standard monthly recurring service invoices to all clients.

nodes.task_description: In the PSA tool, run the monthly billing process for a specific client.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates an invoice based on the client's recurring service contract.

nodes.task_description: Review the generated invoice for accuracy, ensuring all recurring services and user counts are correct.

expected_outcome.value: The invoice is verified to be accurate.

nodes.task_description: Email the finalized invoice to the client's billing contact.

expected_outcome.value: The client successfully receives their monthly invoice.
